revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-4-290

Soil or sand masses with a very high water content leading to fluidisation of the ground.

The term may also be applied to very fine, dry, cohesionless soils.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Running ground}}
